---
title: "Example quarto document"
number-sections: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

# Eval and echo

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| echo: true
  install.packages("tidyverse") 
```

To check your current path, run:
```{r}
#| eval: true
#| echo: false
getwd()
```

We set *echo: true* here.
```{r}
#| eval: true
#| echo: true
getwd()
```
